text: I feel a sense of curiosity and engagement standing here. The walls, adorned with vivid colors and dynamic text, make me wonder about the relationship between human innovation and the spaces we inhabit. The mention of 'R + D'—Research and Development—evokes thoughts about the ever-evolving nature of knowledge and possibility. The quietness of the space encourages reflection, and I feel anticipation about what new ideas I might encounter within these walls.
